special_mechanics.name: Jet Pack Flight
special_mechanics.description: Ranger X equipped with jet pack allowing short periods of flight. Duration limited by jet pack temperature; overheating requires landing and cool down period.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Control (Ex-Up/Indra)
special_mechanics.description: Player can control supporting vehicle (motorcycle called Indra). Indra can move and fire independently of Ranger X. Ranger X can enter vehicle to utilize separate shielding.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Power Management
special_mechanics.description: Standard pulse rifle always available. Special weapons (flamethrower, homing attacks) drain power bar. Power bar recharges only when Ranger X is in bright light source.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. No quantitative movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system data documented in available sources. Game focuses on run-and-gun action with jet pack flight and vehicle mechanics rather than precision platforming physics.
